title: Corrupter repair convoy
content:
{{Top|leg|title=''Corrupter'' repair convoy}}
{{Otheruses|Corrupter}}
A '''group''' of Imperial cargo freighters which were trying to bring repair equipment to damaged [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial II-class Star Destroyer]] [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|''Corrupter'']] in the [[Mev system/Legends|Mev system]]. They were escorted by [[Monitor (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Monitor'']]. They were completely destroyed by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] in the [[Battle of Bettel]], shortly after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]].

The convoy consisted of:

*[[MB-C1 medium transport]] ''[[Tendo]]'', carrying Engineering [[Droid/Legends|droids]]
*MB-C1 medium transport ''[[Sormus]]'', carrying [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droids]]
*MB-C1 medium transport ''[[Togri]]'', carrying 'machinery'
*[[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] ''[[Polis]]'', carrying [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]]
*BFF-1 bulk freighter [[Hilo (BFF-1 bulk freighter)|''Hilo'']], carrying durasteel
*(2x) [[Modular conveyor|Modular Conveyor]] ''[[Benar]]'', carrying 'provisions'
*[[Xiytiar-class heavy transport/Legends|Xiytiar-class transport]] ''[[Kalif]]'', carrying probe droids
*Xiytiar-class transport ''[[Tilark]]'', carrying probe droids
*[[Container transport]] [[Vo (container transport)|''Vo'']], carrying 'hyperdrive parts'
*(4x) [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|Lambda-class T-4a shuttle]] ''[[Lonus]]'' (1-4), carrying 'technicians'

==Behind the scenes==
The three transports carrying Probe Droids is likely a reference to an earlier mission, in which the player destroys three sets of probe droids. The droids mentioned in this mission are likely replenishments.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
